evals.name: single-solution-review
evals.prompt: Generate a solution for the cloud-migration--grosse-energieversorger-de proposition. The project is at the path provided. This is a project-type solution (cloud-services product has revenue_model: project). After generating, run the stakeholder review assessor to evaluate the solution from three perspectives (procurement reviewer, provider SA, client SA). If the verdict is 'revise', apply the improvements and re-assess.
evals.expected_output: Solution JSON with implementation phases, 4 pricing tiers, cost model with buyer adoption defaults (exit clause, client FTE, OT boundary). Review assessment with 3 perspectives, 5 criteria each. If revised, improved scores on Round 2.

assertions.text: Solution JSON has solution_type: project
Solution has 2-5 implementation phases
All four pricing tiers present (proof_of_value, small, medium, large)
cost_model present with effort_by_tier
PoV margin >= 5% and standard tier margins (small, medium, large) >= 25%
Review assessment JSON produced with all three perspectives
Each perspective has 5 scored criteria
Synthesis section has verdict (accept/revise/reject)
If verdict was revise, a second assessment exists with improved scores. PREREQUISITE: SOL-08 must pass — if SOL-08 fails, SOL-09 automatically fails.
Phase descriptions are in German (portfolio language: de)
Arithmetic consistency: for each tier, (price - internal_cost) / price matches stated margin_pct within 2 percentage points
If revision occurred, revised solution differs from original in at least one field flagged by the review recommendations
Solution includes exit clause or transition-out plan in assumptions
Solution includes client-side FTE commitment in assumptions

evals.name: batch-with-review-loop
evals.prompt: Generate solutions for all 3 propositions in the T-Systems project at the path provided. Use batch generation mode. After generating, run the stakeholder review loop. Apply automatic revisions for any solutions with verdict 'revise'. Present a batch summary.
evals.expected_output: 3 solution JSONs with buyer adoption defaults, review assessments for each, batch summary categorizing by acceptance round.

assertions.text: 3 solution JSON files created
Each solution has correct solution_type for its product's revenue_model
Review assessments produced for all 3 solutions
Batch summary categorizes solutions by acceptance round
At least one solution triggered a revision round
Revised solutions have higher scores than Round 1
No more than 2 revision rounds per solution
All solutions include exit clause in assumptions
All standard tier margins (small/medium/large) >= 25%
Solutions targeting same market have consistent assumptions (same role rates, same delivery model)

evals.name: review-existing-solutions
evals.prompt: Review all existing solutions in the T-Systems project at the path provided. Run the solution review assessor on each. Present a portfolio-level assessment showing which solutions pass, which need improvement, and specific recommendations from each stakeholder perspective. Include cross-solution consistency checks.
evals.expected_output: All 3 solutions assessed with three perspective scores, prioritized improvements, cross-solution pattern analysis, and consistency checks.

assertions.text: All 3 solutions assessed
Each assessment has three perspective scores
Synthesis includes prioritized improvements (CRITICAL/HIGH/OPTIONAL)
Recommendations are specific and actionable (reference specific fields/values)
Portfolio-level summary identifies cross-solution patterns
Portfolio consistency check flags exit clause inconsistency across solutions targeting the same market
Client SA perspective scores are surfaced and diagnosed if consistently lowest
